orig_text:
the Current-Link's Remote Identifier MUST match the 
Remote-Link's Local Identifier, and the Current-Link's 
Remote Identifier MUST match the Remote-Link's 
Local Identifier.
correct_text:
the Current-Link's Remote Identifier MUST match the 
Remote-Link's Local Identifier, and the Current-Link's 
Local Identifier MUST match the Remote-Link's 
Remote Identifier.
notes: The same sentence is repeated twice in the original text. The second half should indicate the other side of matching, i.e., Current-Link's Local matching with Remote-Link's Remote.
The correct terminology is TIME_TO_LEARN_INTERVAL based on RFC8405 (https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8405).
